title: Finish or rescope the component catalog roadmap
description:
Created from the project state audit.

Resolve the mismatch between the Done board task for catalog expansion and the roadmap acceptance criteria.

Context:
- `docs/component-catalog-roadmap.md` says catalog expansion is complete when every backlog module has a descriptor and starter files.
- Current descriptors implement the first expansion slice, but the roadmap still lists missing modules: Authorization, Payments, Search, Email, DataPipeline, ML, GraphDB, Logging, PluginExtension, Monorepo, LegacyMigration, Documentation, Testing, and DevTools.

Implementation options:
- Implement the remaining roadmap modules with descriptors, starter Markdown files, presets where useful, icon mappings/fallbacks, and tests.
- Or explicitly rescope the roadmap and completed Lynvo item so the current work is documented as a first expansion slice.

Acceptance criteria:
- Roadmap, code, tests, and board state agree on what is complete.
- Missing modules are either implemented or intentionally deferred in a new backlog section.

Code anchors: `docs/component-catalog-roadmap.md:67`, `src/modules/moduleDescriptors.ts:337`.

checklist.text: Decide whether to implement remaining modules or rescope the roadmap
If implementing, add descriptors and starter files for the remaining backlog modules
Update presets, icon mapping/fallback documentation, and generated-module tests
Update docs and Lynvo status so completion criteria match code
